# Distributed Eq. (26) 2x2 MPS Benchmark

## Setup
- Global system: `11` qubits.
- Local qubits per agent: `10`.
- Spectrum source: `sparse_eigsh`.
- Scaled spectrum check: `lambda_min=0.05`, `lambda_max=1`.
- Row Laplacian: `[[0.5, -0.5], [-0.5, 0.5]]`.
- Column consensus weights: `[[0.5, 0.5], [0.5, 0.5]]`.

## Timings
- Forward global cost mean: `0.314183 s`.
- Reverse-mode global gradient mean: `27.185222 s`.
- One distributed iteration mean: `42.808103 s`.

## One Iteration Diagnostics
- Current global cost: `1.08393973027`.
- Alpha gradient L2 norm: `0.858525394979`.
- Beta gradient L2 norm: `0.551715504892`.
- Alpha update L2 norm: `0.896620947715`.
- Beta update L2 norm: `0.899778306764`.
